stages.name: data_pipeline
stages.description: Reader reads A tiles into cb_in0, compute copies cb_in0 to cb_out (identity), writer writes cb_out to DRAM. Verifies data pipeline without matmul logic.
stages.extra_setup:
input_b = torch.randn(shape, dtype=torch.bfloat16)
input_b_tensor = ttnn.from_torch(input_b, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)

stages.name: matmul_compute
stages.description: Full matmul C=AxB using all three helpers: read_matmul_tiles, matmul_1d, write_matmul_tiles.
stages.extra_setup:
M, K = shape[-2], shape[-1]
N = {"(1, 1, 32, 32)": 32, "(1, 1, 64, 128)": 64, "(1, 1, 32, 128)": 64, "(1, 1, 128, 64)": 128, "(1, 1, 32, 256)": 32}[str(shape)]
input_b = torch.randn(*shape[:-2], K, N, dtype=torch.bfloat16)
input_b_tensor = ttnn.from_torch(input_b, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)
